_comment: Country codes (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, lowercase) to skip per source, because that source's API has confirmed it never returns results for that country (a 404 or empty-by-design response). Add a code here the moment you see it fail in the run log - no code changes needed, just edit this file and commit. Only sources that actually branch on country are listed: Jooble and Adzuna. Reed is UK-only and ignores country entirely; Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby don't take a country parameter at all.
